notEnoughTravelTime.title: Not enough travel time
notEnoughTravelTime.message:
Travel takes {{duration}}, earliest arrival at {{fastest}}.
You've selected {{shortage}} earlier. Please pick a later time or use "Set suggested time".

eventLate.title: Later than {{name}} ({{time}})
eventLate.message:
Your selected time ({{selected}}) is {{diff}} later than the event.
Please arrive earlier to participate!

eventOk.title: {{name}} takes place at {{time}}
eventOk.message:
Make sure to time it right!
Staying duration until {{type}} starts: ~{{window}}.
eventOk.messageShort:
You'll arrive only {{window}} before {{type}}. Consider arriving a bit earlier.
Staying duration until {{type}} starts: ~{{window}}.

siteClosed.title: Closed ({{time}})
siteClosed.message:
Your selected time ({{selected}}) is {{diff}} after closing time.
Please move to earlier or another day.

massStarted.title: Mass at {{time}} has started
massStarted.message: You will arrive {{late}} late for mass. Consider arriving before {{target}}.

arriveEarly.title: Arriving early (Opens at {{time}})
arriveEarly.message: You'll arrive {{wait}} before opening. You can visit outside or take photos while waiting.

stayPastClosing.title: Rest duration exceeds closing
stayPastClosing.message:
You arrive at {{selected}} and rest for {{duration}}, leaving at {{leave}} — {{over}} after closing time ({{close}}).
Actual visiting window: {{window}}.

goodBuffer.title: Comfortable time buffer
goodBuffer.message:
You have {{buffer}} extra buffer on the way.
Staying duration until closing: ~{{window}}.
goodBuffer.messageOnly: You have {{buffer}} extra buffer on the way.

firstStop.title: Start of the day
firstStop.message:
{{schedule}}. Make sure to time it right!
Staying duration until Mass: ~{{window}}.
firstStop.messageNoMass: Please select a start time. Don't forget to check the opening hours!

ideal.title: Reasonable timing
ideal.message: Your selected time is very suitable. You have ~{{window}} to stay comfortably.
ideal.messageNoWindow: Your selected time is very suitable for the itinerary.
